gaps.rationale: Current shell is safe but card-basic; no strong hero hierarchy.
iq_estimate renders as simple metric block; needs authoritative hero design after backend claim gate.
Needs backend/CMS reviewed explanation of online estimate and limitations.
Fields exist but explanatory copy and norm authority are not productized.
Flags render but are technical; users need readable reliability interpretation without hiding caution.
Cards exist, but no deep-dive content architecture or web-native visualization.
Safe copy exists; should become visible section and reviewed source of truth.
beta30/beta50 display model exists elsewhere; result page does not explain bank/form.
No result-page section for bank_id/form_code/norm_version/claim eligibility.
Report module exists, but preview teaser is placeholder/state-machine oriented.
Frontend can render sections, but backend content depth remains limited/gated.
Payload placeholders exist; delivery and claim policy deferred.
Generic result access/share ecosystem exists, but IQ-specific action section not mapped.
Contracts exist; visual/mobile screenshot QA not done in this scan.
Guards exist; future design must not frontend-infer IQ/percentile/eligibility.
No IQ result media pack/cover assets found as frontend static authority.
Private result page noindex; public /results/iq is P1 review-gated and not current result route.
